title: Unit 01 pulling apart Sachiels AT field
display_title: Unit 01 pulling apart Sachiels AT field
wikitext:
[]: Unit 01 pulling apart Sachiel's AT field...             Quote Post by Margerald » Tue Oct 02, 2012 5:44 am Shinji's first fight in Unit 01 was against the angel Sachiel. He charged into Sachiel, but was thrown backwards when he came into contact with its AT field (I don't remember if Unit 01 was berserk at this point). Unit 01 looked down at its hand, repaired it, and then proceeded to pry the AT field apart. How/why was Unit 01 able to pry apart Sachiel's AT field?

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Tue Oct 02, 2012 6:13 am By using its own AT field. I think this is explained by Maya and/or Ritsuko at the time.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Tue Oct 02, 2012 11:03 am Because it was the show's pilot and Anno wanted to show off the show's action/mecha element. Most of the mechanics regarding A.T. fields weren't "written" until after they completed the first six episodes or so.

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Tue Oct 02, 2012 12:57 pm Is the intensity of the at field based on the will power of the angel/eva? Perhaps Sachiel's At field was not strong enough to withstand the force of unit one?

[]:             Quote Post by Der Kommissar » Tue Oct 02, 2012 1:00 pm AT Fields vary in strength, certainly. Ramiel's is noted as being ludicrously strong.

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Tue Oct 02, 2012 1:01 pm Der Kommissar wrote: AT Fields vary in strength, certainly. Ramiel's is noted as being ludicrously strong.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Oct 02, 2012 4:34 pm Rj123541 wrote: So that means that Unit 1's Physical strength was stronger than Sachiel's At Field correct?

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Tue Oct 02, 2012 9:17 pm Like Ran said it's mostly just a plot device (kinda) i think. Plus even when it got more defined it was only on vague terms. But yeah i would say that Unit 01's Strenght and AT Field are what allowed her to "erode" or something, throught Sachiel's AT Field.
